name: Overnight Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup water chestnuts, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place lettuce in approximately 2 quart size container (a clear container is great to show off the different layers).
2. Layer the vegetables on top of the lettuce: onions, then celery, chestnuts, and peas.
3. Mix topping ingredients: mayonnaise, sugar, Parmesan cheese, seasoned salt, and garlic powder.
4. Spread the mixed topping on top of the salad.
5. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
6. Remove from refrigerator and add final toppings: chopped hard boiled eggs, crumbled cooked bacon, and additional grated cheese.
7. Garnish with tomato wedges and fresh parsley.
